steps.title: Spot the contradiction between expectation and reality
steps.content: The passage states scientists believe fusion can meet humanity's clean energy needs, then immediately presents a limiting reality: prior to December 2022, no lab reaction achieved net energy gain. The transition word must signal this is a counterpoint despite the preceding optimism.

steps.title: Apply the contrast to find the transition
steps.content: ”That said” is a concession word meaning “despite the preceding statement” — exactly the contrasting force needed here. The other choices don't provide this counterpoint: they either imply consequence, continue in the same direction, or narrow a claim rather than opposing it. That matches choice D — D is correct.
